home.title: Welcome to SimpleECommerce
home.description: This public landing page introduces the store before sign in. Use it to understand the app, then choose how you want to continue.
home.panelMessage: Everything is laid out for a quick first impression and an easy next step.
home.featureCatalogDescription: Product sections adapt to the screen size without clutter.
home.featureSecurityDescription: Use sign in or registration when you are ready to continue.
home.featureResponsiveDescription: The layout stays readable on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

account.title: Your account
account.description: This page reads the authenticated user state and exposes the active roles and token preview.
account.tokenLabel: Short preview of the current bearer token

seller.title: Seller workspace
seller.description: Only users with the seller role can keep moving through this route.
seller.accessSummary: This screen is guarded before rendering.

admin.title: Admin workspace
admin.description: Only users with the admin role can open this area.
admin.accessSummary: Guarded with the same frontend flow.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.message: You do not have permission to access this page.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.message: The page you requested could not be found.
